title: Amanj Sherwany
text: Home * People * Amanj Sherwany AmanjSherwany [1] Amanj Sherwany , born in Kurdistan/Iraq, he is a computer scientist [2] and the author of the UCI compliant open source chess engine Zahak , first released in February 2021 [3] .
